PICTURES SENT TO NWS BY MEDIA SHOW EVIDENCE OF SMALL TORNADO NEAR THE TIME THE CIRCULATION WAS EVIDENT IN TPBI TDWR IN THE VICINITY OF PALM BEACH GARDENS. THIS COINCIDE ALSO WITH REAL TIME REPORTS RECEIVED BY TRAINED SPOTTERS OF A POSSIBLE TORNADO TOUCHDOWN BETWEEN LILAC AND MILITARY TRAIL. HAIL WAS ALSO REPORTED WITH THIS EVENT AS WELL AS TREES DOWN IN THE INTERSECTION OF DONALD ROSS ROAD AND A1A.

*** 2 INJ *** 2 PEOPLE WERE INJURED DUE TO DAMAGE FROM BROKEN GLASS NEAR NE 163 ST AND BISCAYNE BLVD IN NORTH MIAMI BEACH.
